name: ProgramEnrolment.addApprovalDescendantsWithLatestStatus
use_when: Eligibility or validation rule needs to collect all approval statuses for encounters and checklists.

name: ProgramEnrolment.addChecklist
use_when: Internal mutation — replaces checklist with matching UUID in the list; rarely called from rules.

name: ProgramEnrolment.addEncounter
use_when: Internal mutation — appends a programme encounter if UUID is not already present; rarely called from rules.

name: ProgramEnrolment.addEncounters
use_when: Internal mutation — appends multiple programme encounters; rarely called from rules.

name: ProgramEnrolment.addObservation
use_when: Internal mutation — appends an observation to enrolment observations; rarely called from rules.

name: ProgramEnrolment.allEncounterTypes
use_when: Returns deduplicated list of all encounter types in enrolment.

name: ProgramEnrolment.approvalStatuses
use_when: Eligibility or validation rule retrieves all approval status records for enrolment.

name: ProgramEnrolment.associateChild
use_when: Internal framework plumbing — associates child entities (encounters, checklists, approvals) to parent enrolment.

name: ProgramEnrolment.checklists
use_when: Returns all non-voided checklists for the enrolment.

name: ProgramEnrolment.cloneForEdit
use_when: Internal serialization — creates edit-ready copy with cloned checklists and locations; framework use.

name: ProgramEnrolment.createEmptyInstance
use_when: Internal factory — creates new enrolment instance with empty collections and UUID; framework use.

name: ProgramEnrolment.createdBy
use_when: Returns username of the user who created enrolment.

name: ProgramEnrolment.createdByUUID
use_when: Returns UUID of the user who created enrolment.

name: ProgramEnrolment.encounters
use_when: Returns all non-voided programme encounters in enrolment.

name: ProgramEnrolment.enrolmentDateTime
use_when: Returns enrolment start date-time for schedule, eligibility, or validation rules.

name: ProgramEnrolment.enrolmentLocation
use_when: Returns Point location where enrolment was registered.

name: ProgramEnrolment.everScheduledEncounters
use_when: Returns all encounters scheduled (have earliestVisitDateTime) and not cancelled.

name: ProgramEnrolment.everScheduledEncountersOfType
use_when: Returns ever-scheduled encounters matching the specified encounter type name.

name: ProgramEnrolment.exitLocation
use_when: Returns Point location where enrolment was exited.

name: ProgramEnrolment.findEncounter
use_when: Returns encounter by type name and encounter name; validation or summary rule use.

name: ProgramEnrolment.findExitObservation
use_when: Retrieve a program exit observation by concept name or UUID to check exit conditions.

name: ProgramEnrolment.findGroupedObservation
use_when: Extract grouped child observations within a parent concept for multi-part eligibility checks.

name: ProgramEnrolment.findLastEncounterOfType
use_when: Locate the most recent encounter before current to reference prior visit data in rules.

name: ProgramEnrolment.findLatestObservationFromEncounters
use_when: Retrieve the latest observation value across enrolment and current encounter for comparisons.

name: ProgramEnrolment.findLatestObservationFromPreviousEncounters
use_when: Get the most recent observation from past encounters, optionally within grouped concepts.

name: ProgramEnrolment.findLatestObservationInEntireEnrolment
use_when: Fetch the most recent observation across all enrolment encounters, including current.

name: ProgramEnrolment.findLatestPreviousEncounterWithObservationForConcept
use_when: Find the most recent prior encounter containing a specific concept observation.

name: ProgramEnrolment.findLatestPreviousEncounterWithValueForConcept
use_when: Locate the latest prior encounter with a specific observation answer concept value.

name: ProgramEnrolment.findMediaObservations
use_when: Collect all media observations from enrolment and exit data — internal mutation, rarely called from rules.

name: ProgramEnrolment.findNthLastEncounterOfType
use_when: Retrieve the Nth previous encounter of a given type for multi-step historical analysis.

name: ProgramEnrolment.findObservation
use_when: Retrieve an observation by concept name or UUID, optionally nested under a parent concept.

name: ProgramEnrolment.findObservationInEntireEnrolment
use_when: Search for observations across all enrolment encounters, optionally returning the latest match.

name: ProgramEnrolment.findObservationInLastEncounter
use_when: Fetch an observation from the most recent encounter of the same type.

name: ProgramEnrolment.findObservationValueInEntireEnrolment
use_when: Return readable observation value and date from entire enrolment history, defaulting to enrolment date.

name: ProgramEnrolment.fromResource
use_when: Deserialize a program enrolment from REST resource with linked program and individual — internal framework method.

name: ProgramEnrolment.getAllScheduledVisits
use_when: Return upcoming scheduled encounters excluding current, formatted for visit schedule rules.

name: ProgramEnrolment.getChecklists
use_when: Retrieve enrolment checklists for summary or validation — internal framework accessor.

name: ProgramEnrolment.getEncounters
use_when: All encounters in this enrolment. Pass `true` to include voided/cancelled.

name: ProgramEnrolment.getEncountersOfType
use_when: All encounters of the given encounter-type name in this enrolment.

name: ProgramEnrolment.getEntityTypeName
use_when: Return the program name as the entity type identifier — internal framework accessor.

name: ProgramEnrolment.getName
use_when: Return literal 'ProgramEnrolment' string — internal framework identifier.

name: ProgramEnrolment.getObservationReadableValue
use_when: Retrieve the human-readable value of an observation by concept name or UUID.

name: ProgramEnrolment.getObservationReadableValueInEntireEnrolment
use_when: Read the human-readable observed value of a concept across the whole enrolment.

name: ProgramEnrolment.getObservationValue
use_when: Retrieve a single observation value for a concept during eligibility or summary rules.

name: ProgramEnrolment.getObservationsForConceptName
use_when: Collect all observation values and timestamps for a concept across all encounters.

name: ProgramEnrolment.getSchemaName
use_when: Internal schema lookup—rarely called from rules.

name: ProgramEnrolment.hasAnyOfEncounterTypes
use_when: Check if enrolment contains encounters matching any supplied encounter type names.

name: ProgramEnrolment.hasChecklist
use_when: Determine if this enrolment has associated checklists for eligibility or summary.

name: ProgramEnrolment.hasCompletedEncounterOfType
use_when: True when an encounter of the given type has been completed (has `encounterDateTime`).

name: ProgramEnrolment.hasEncounter
use_when: True when an encounter of the given name exists in this enrolment.

name: ProgramEnrolment.hasEncounterOfType
use_when: Verify that a specific encounter type exists within the enrolment.

name: ProgramEnrolment.hasEncounterWithObservationValueAfterDate
use_when: Check if encounter of type with matching observation value exists after a given date.

name: ProgramEnrolment.hasObservation
use_when: Verify an observation exists for a concept during eligibility or validation rules.

name: ProgramEnrolment.individual
use_when: Access the enrolled individual entity for attribute or decision lookups.

name: ProgramEnrolment.isActive
use_when: Returns true when enrolment has no exit date for active eligibility checks.

name: ProgramEnrolment.isRejectedEntity
use_when: Returns true when latest approval status is rejected—use in eligibility rules.

name: ProgramEnrolment.lastFulfilledEncounter
use_when: Retrieve the most recent encounter, optionally filtered by encounter type names.

name: ProgramEnrolment.lastModifiedBy
use_when: Internal audit property—rarely called from rules.

name: ProgramEnrolment.lastModifiedByUUID
use_when: Internal audit property—rarely called from rules.

name: ProgramEnrolment.latestEntityApprovalStatus
use_when: Fetch the newest approval status record by timestamp for review checks.

name: ProgramEnrolment.nonVoidedEncounters
use_when: Filter to active (non-voided) encounters for rule logic and eligibility.

name: ProgramEnrolment.numberOfEncountersOfType
use_when: Count non-voided encounters of a specific type for frequency or schedule rules.

name: ProgramEnrolment.observationExistsInEntireEnrolment
use_when: Check if observation exists anywhere in enrolment, excluding current encounter.

name: ProgramEnrolment.observations
use_when: Internal entity list conversion—rarely called from rules.

name: ProgramEnrolment.program
use_when: Access the enrolled program entity for program-level rules or metadata.

name: ProgramEnrolment.programExitDateTime
use_when: Eligibility or summary rules check whether a beneficiary has exited a program.

name: ProgramEnrolment.programExitObservations
use_when: Validation or summary rules access observations recorded at program exit.

name: ProgramEnrolment.replaceMediaObservation
use_when: Internal mutation for media observation updates — rarely called directly from rules.

name: ProgramEnrolment.replaceObservation
use_when: Internal mutation updating observations in both enrolment and exit stages — framework use.

name: ProgramEnrolment.scheduledEncounters
use_when: Visit schedule rules retrieve pending encounters without completion or cancellation dates.

name: ProgramEnrolment.scheduledEncountersOfType
use_when: Encounters of the given type that are scheduled but not yet completed.

name: ProgramEnrolment.setLatestEntityApprovalStatus
use_when: Internal mutation recording approval status — framework plumbing, not rule-facing.

name: ProgramEnrolment.toJSON
use_when: Serialization for internal storage — framework use, not called from rule logic.

name: ProgramEnrolment.toResource
use_when: Serialization for API/network transport — framework use, not called from rules.

name: ProgramEnrolment.updateAudit
use_when: Internal mutation stamping audit fields — framework plumbing, not rule-facing.

name: ProgramEnrolment.validateEnrolment
use_when: Returns validation errors if enrolment date is empty, invalid, before registration, or future.

name: ProgramEnrolment.validateExit
use_when: Returns validation errors if exit date is empty, invalid, before enrolment, or future.
